title: APIIDA Gateway
description: A managed API gateway instance registered with APIIDA, typically a Broadcom Layer7 gateway used for API deployment and monitoring.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the gateway

status.description: Current connection status of the gateway

type.description: Gateway platform type (e.g. Layer7, Kong, AWS)

apiCount.description: Number of APIs currently deployed on this gateway

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the gateway was registered

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the gateway record was last updated
